codeReview.summary: PermissionMode enum correctly derives Ord/PartialOrd with strict ordering Deny < Ask < Suggest < Auto. ToolSpec::required_permission field exists with type PermissionMode, defaulting to Ask. ThreeLayerEvaluator implements three-layer priority evaluation (Deny=100, Ask=50, Allow=10) ensuring Deny always wins.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Test coverage gap for Deny vs Ask conflict scenario - tests cover Deny vs Allow and Ask vs Allow but not Deny vs Ask together.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Three-layer evaluator tests verify Deny vs Allow and Ask vs Allow but not Deny vs Ask interaction

summary: Feature PASSED review. PermissionMode enum correctly implements ordering, ToolSpec has required_permission field, and ThreeLayerEvaluator properly prioritizes Deny rules. Non-blocking test coverage gap noted for Deny vs Ask scenario.
